reasoning: Revenue growth is strong but isn't translating to profit — classic M&A integration risk. The convertible bond signal is concerning. At 1.4% of portfolio with a small gain, this is a watch position. Need to see margin stabilization before adding. The AI thesis is unproven. bullCase: ABRA (Abra Information Technologies) delivered 24.6% revenue growth to ₪554M in FY2025, Q4 alone +39%. Management bullish on AI thesis. ₪150M available for M&A. FCF improved to ₪16.2M. Position up 8.4%.
bearCase: Net income flat at ₪13.5M despite 25% revenue growth — margins compressing (gross 23.1%, operating 5.5%, net 2.4%). P/E 33x is expensive for IT services with flat profits. Convertible bond exploration (Feb 2026) signals potential dilution. Stock down 34% from ATH in Jan 2026. TASE IT sector broadly under pressure.
